	Yangping county, Wei kingdom (Presently Qing Feng in He Nan Province)

	 Other Names 
	Yue Jing, Le Jin, Le Xin

	 Name Notes 
	His name is incorrectly translated as Yue Jing in some Brewitt-Taylor editions. Yue Jin is also sometimes translated as Le Jin (and in Destiny of an Emperor they somehow botched it up further to Le Xin).

full_text:
Yue Jin (Wenqian) 樂進 (文謙)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Yue Jin (樂進), styledWenqian (文謙), was born in Yangping county, Wei kingdom (Presently Qing Feng in He Nan Province). Served Cao Cao from the beginning. Shot from his horse by Gan Ning. Small-framed. Yue Jin was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom. Yue Jin lived during the Later Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.
